title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Fire-Boltt - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Fire-Boltt - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Fire-Boltt! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Fire-Boltt:
Fire-Boltt is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fire-Boltt!
